S.FORM: Central african republic u siwkay nu kanatal u Central african republic sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 7 00 N, 21 00 E, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 622,984 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 622,984 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 0 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 5,507,257. kakalukan umah sa 8.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 36.20%, zumaay henay umah sa 55.70% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Bangui . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 1 bulad 12 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 3 bulad 30 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata kina kanatal sa, silima ku kulit, u semilaway, u sangelacay, u landaway, u takuliway atu sumanahay. sibunac a kulit i kalimucu nu hata. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: šł≠ťĚěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč u sulit nu Lipun: šł≠Ś§ģ„āĘ„Éē„É™„āęŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilik: Central African Republic Central african republic "Fa-yu , R√©publique centrafricaine", "Sang-ke-yu , K√∂d√∂r√∂s√™se t√ģ B√™afr√ģka", singangan tu nu Zung-bey , Ban-ci u kahenulan a tuse nu Zung-bey , i tini i tebang nu Zung-bey a kanatal,mala u lalabuay a tukus nu kanatal, Zung-bey namakaysatipan malingatu duduc tu nu piliyuc nu tuki a pasayzaan, pasazumaen tu Ke-may-lung , Cha-de , Su-tan , Nan-su-tan , Democratic Republic of the Congo atu Congo, the republic of the matatules tulala', Zung-bey palekal i 1958 a mihcaan 12 a bulad, namalingatu tu pangkiw a misakaku kunu cenhuay satu 1960 a mihcaan 8 a bulad 13 a demiad tatengaay tu manusakamu tu mamisateked, kahenulan a tuse a Ban-ci upabelin a kamu Ban-cy han, i tini i U-ban-ci-he mililis nu tukus i tapiingan nu tuse. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: šł≠ťĚěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique centrafricaineÔľõś°ĎśąąŤ™ě:K√∂d√∂r√∂s√™se t√ģ B√™afr√ģka),ťÄöÁ®Īšł≠ťĚě,ÁŹ≠Śüļ(Bangui)- (Bangui, (Oubangui)ś≤ŅŚ≤łÁöĄťāäŚĘÉŚüéŚłā.) ayaw nu Zung-bey tungusay nu U-ban-ci-siya-li (Territoire d'Oubangui-Chari)a lala', nu Fa-ku i tiniay i Fay-cow nu micumutay, 1960 a mihcaan namisateked, Central african republic mikilul tu nu hulic mikeliday a tademaw ku mikuwanay pasu nacacay mademec mitanam tu nu hung-ti a lice, 1993 a mihcaan, i kacakat nu ka cunusan tu demiad tanutuwa' saku suni nu binawlan, Zung-bey kinacacay henay nu binawlan a pisingkiw ci An-ze-fay-li-ke-si-pa-ta-say ku mala cung-tungay, 2003 a mihcaan Zung-bey masumat kukawaw nu hitay, ci Pa-ta-say-pa-fu-lang-suo-wa-bo-ci-ze u sakakaay a hitay mapaales. 2004 a mihcaan mabuwah mangangaay ku lalabuay, anu mahicahica milihiza tu nu tatusa a ngangayaw i 2007 a mihcaan masasulit paketun tu masasukapah a tatelek , atu 2011 a mihcaan masasulit makaketun asa tu zumaay cacay a lice, a masasukapah a tateled, nika i 2012 a mihcaan masacukah aca, lalid satu mangangaay atu milihicaay a ngangayaw sikuwang sibakudang tuku sakaput katuud macunus tuku micalap tu mikuwanay tu tademaw a kawaw, mahiniay pakuniza milupu mitiik atu pikelec mikena tu sin-bun tu tumisakakuay mikawaw, uynian a kanatal katenes mahiza tu masasiput ku nipikuwan tu tademaw atu nisulitan tu mahiniay a kawaw. payawan Central african republic a kayadah nu kuang-cang atu lalayan a kasilacul, mahiniay u You nisupedan kayadah simal , u kimng , malikaday a ba'tu , Cu ,kasuy , u nanum dingki atu kakalukan a lala', mahiniay tu i kitakit u sapakuyucay saka cacay bataan ku cacay a kanatal, katukuh ayza i 2017 a mihcaan, Central african republic a tademaw GDP "u nipicakay u lecat nu aca aniasipan" i tini i kitakit u pasazikuzan a miasip u saayaway, 2019 a mihcaan, Central african republic a tatemaw nipaalekalan a tinsu i tini i kitakit u pasazikuzan a miasip u sakatusa, i tini dada' talakaw tu ni-rl a kanatal, izaw patahkal ku nigingkuwan , Central african republic i kitakitan u cayay ka tanektek a kanatal atu u cayay katatunus tu masakapahay a tademaw nu kanatal. ayaw pakala tu 10,000 a mihcaan, malakedakedalan tu umiadupay u mialaay tu misupeday a niyazu' pasatimul mabulaw katukuh i Zung-bey nuwamisan a Sa-he-lel a kakitizaan, uynian a niyazu' malinga'tu tu mananel malukay ku kawaw. kunian mala u baluhay ba'tuay a zi-tay palekal tu zumaay a ngangayaw. kasumamadan tu pitu a mihcaan Zung-bey katuud tu ku muenengay itizi a tademaw, u heni u zuma makuwan nu pinay tu nu Ta-di-ku a kanatal, cunus tu Jiy-nie-mu-mu-po-nu (Kanem-Bornu), Ua-da-iy (Ouaddai),Pa-ci-rl-mi (Baguirmi)atu tutuc tu papaway a Ni-lu , Ca-de-hu u angangan nu Da-bu (Dafour)a niyazu', namahiza satu zikuzan satu, katuuday a Su-dan a kanatal pangiha musakamu izaway tu ayzaay a Zung-bey , mala u makayniay ku kuli, mala u pacakayay tu lumeni'ay a kuli u caculilan a zazan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Śú®7šłĖÁīÄ, -ŚćöŚä™(Kanem-Bornu),Áď¶ťĀĒšľä(Ouaddai),Ś∑īŚźČÁąĺÁĪ≥(Baguirmi) (Dafour)ťÉ®ŤźĹ.ŚĺĆšĺÜ, .) 1875 a mihcaan Su-dan a kanatal Su-dan mikuwan tu ku U-ban-ci(ÁÉŹÁŹ≠ŚüļRabih az-Zubayr), 1894 a mihcaan tungusay tu nu Kang-ku ,,1903 a mihcaan u Fa-ku tungusay nu U-ban-ci(ÁÉŹÁŹ≠ŚüļRabih az-Zubayr) (Territoire d'Oubangui-Chari)a lala',1910 a mihcaan u Fa-ku tungusay nu Ce-taw-fiy-cow , 1958 a mihcaan patingen tu sakaku a cenbu, satu pala u pangkiway a ce-ceay Central african republic (R√©pulique Centrafricaine), ci Pa-tay-le-mi-po-kang-ta u saayaway mala micuwanay tu cenbu,,1959 a mihcaan ci Po-kang-ea mapatay i kahetik nu hikuki, ci Da-wey-da-ke (David Dacko) ku micalukay mala mikuwanay nu cenbu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 1875ŚĻī,ŤėášłĻŚúčŤėášłĻRabih az-Zubayr (Territoire d'Oubangui-Chari),1910 (R√©pulique Centrafricaine), (David Dacko)ÁĻľšĽĽÁāļÁłĹÁźÜ.) 1960 a mihcaan 8 a bulad 13 a mihcaan namiskaku kuCentral african republic hawsa, ci Da-wey-da-ke mananunul mala cung-dung , caay katenes mala u tiniay a kanatal usaayaway mala cung-dung , mikawaw tu cacayay a sakapu nu cenbu amiteked amicuean, 1965 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 31 a demiad tusansandeban , u sakakaay nu hitay, i hekalay a hitay tu sakakaay ci Pu-ksa'-sang-siaw palekal pasazuma tu kawaw nu cenbu mibelin tu Da-ke-da-ka-sa i sakatusa a demiad sateked sa cung-dung , ci Pu-ksa'-sang tahekal amicuzuh amicukah a kawaw, mangelu' ku tademaw 1976 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 4 a demiad, ci Pu-ksa'-sang sakaku sa a mala hun-ti, pasumat tu ngangan nu kanatal Zung-bey hung-ti a kanatal saan, satu i tucilal a mihcaan 12 a bulad 4 a demiad mikawaw tu tabakiay a pacakat tu kawaw. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 1979ŚĻī9śúą20śó•, .) 1981 a mihcaan 9 a bulad ci, An-de-liy-ke-lin-pa sakakaay nu hitay palekal misumat tu kawaw nu cen-ce,mipabelin ci Da-ce , u sakakaay tu satalakaway a tabang nu kanatal, 1993 a mihcaan, Zung-bey mikawaw tu i laylayay u saayaway u binawlan ku misingkiway, ci An-ce-biy-li-ce-se-pa-da-say malaay mala cung-tung , 2003 a mihcaan 3 a bulad ayaw nu sikuwanay sibakudangay , midebung tu kahenulan a tuse nu ,u cenbu ni Pa-da-say pabelin, ci Pu-si-ce sakaku sa patizeng mala cung-dung , ci Pu-si-ce i 2005 a mihcaan tu pisingkiwan pakatemec mala cung-dung tu, nami mililabang tu milakalakay i Hay-di a cung-dung ci A-li-se-di-de . kakitizaan atu wayway nu lala'šĹćÁĹģŤąáŚúįŚĹĘ Central african republic i tini i amisan tulu du katukuh sabaw cacay a du an, uynian a kanatal i tini i fiy-cow-ta-lu tu kapulangan a kasaupuan, u tinulan tayza nuwamisan pasayza nuwalian satipan u kakayzaan mucilil a zazan, u pingayawan a kakitizaan u sakahenulan mahamin a kanatal pulung nu hekal 62 bam 5900 pin-bang-kung-li , Zung-bey a nuwalian nuamisan atu Su-dan matatules ku lala', nuwalian mitules tu timulan a ŤėášłĻ, nutimulan a lilis u the republic of the , satipan timulan u belaw u Kang-ku , satipan mitules tu Ce-may-lung , nuwamisan atu Ha-de u laet tu bayu pakala tu cacay a malebud kung-li , u nayay ku sacumut nu bayu lalabuay nu tukus a kanatal, talabu nu kanatal a lala' satalakawsa uyni u adidi'ay sahebunghebung , palalicat tu talakaw pakalatu pitu lasubu a depa 9 kung-ce ,nu Fay cuw tepan atu timulan u satalakaway kakitizaanay. i lalabu Zun-biašł≠ťĚě a kanatal, mabalad u sauwac angangan a sauwac, izaw ku atuśõľś≥Ęś≤≥(Mambere)u diheb a sauwac masaenal ku lala' tusaay a tukus ilikutay a lala' atu talakaway a buyubuyu'an. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: (Mambere)Á≠Č, .) demiadśį£ŚÄô Central african republic atu nuwamisan tungusay i akudi'ay a nalinabuan a kakitizaan a bali, nutinulan uyza u akuti'ay a kilakilangan ku demiad, palalecad tunu akuti' nu hekal, pakala tu se-se 27.8 du: hua-se82 du", nutimulanay u nikaudad katanayu' katukuh i walu a buladan tabaki ku udada i satimulan pamihcaan tu udad pakala tu cacay malebud tusa lasubud haw-mi, u diheb a sauwac i capiay masemed aca tatungus tu sakalukan. miciliway a hitay tu mikulinuway 2004 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 5 demiad mamin u binawlan ku paketunay maawas tu balyhay a hulic, lekec tu cung-tung mala u talakaway a tapang nu kanatal, u nikakelul nisingkiuwan ku a Cung-tung, lima a mihcaan ku kala Cung-tungan, taneng malalit kinacacay, cung-li u tapang nu cen-bu, u Cung-tung ku situngusay, baluhay a hulic malaheci hawsa saayaway lekec u cu-min-yi'-huy izaw ku 105 a giing, kakelul sanay tu ku pisingkuw lima a mihcaan pala Cung-tungan. Central african republic i kitakit u saadidi'ay nipahalat u kaluk namisatekat cen-bu miida tu nutauwan a kanatal tu pipatang. S.FORM: Central african republic u siwkay nu kanatal u Central african republic sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 7 00 N, 21 00 E, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 622,984 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 622,984 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 0 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 5,507,257. kakalukan umah sa 8.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 36.20%, zumaay henay umah sa 55.70% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Bangui . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 1 bulad 12 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 3 bulad 30 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata kina kanatal sa, silima ku kulit, u semilaway, u sangelacay, u landaway, u takuliway atu sumanahay. sibunac a kulit i kalimucu nu hata. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: šł≠ťĚěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč u sulit nu Lipun: šł≠Ś§ģ„āĘ„Éē„É™„āęŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilik: Central African Republic Central african republic "Fa-yu , R√©publique centrafricaine", "Sang-ke-yu , K√∂d√∂r√∂s√™se t√ģ B√™afr√ģka", singangan tu nu Zung-bey , Ban-ci u kahenulan a tuse nu Zung-bey , i tini i tebang nu Zung-bey a kanatal,mala u lalabuay a tukus nu kanatal, Zung-bey namakaysatipan malingatu duduc tu nu piliyuc nu tuki a pasayzaan, pasazumaen tu Ke-may-lung , Cha-de , Su-tan , Nan-su-tan , Democratic Republic of the Congo atu Congo, the republic of the matatules tulala', Zung-bey palekal i 1958 a mihcaan 12 a bulad, namalingatu tu pangkiw a misakaku kunu cenhuay satu 1960 a mihcaan 8 a bulad 13 a demiad tatengaay tu manusakamu tu mamisateked, kahenulan a tuse a Ban-ci upabelin a kamu Ban-cy han, i tini i U-ban-ci-he mililis nu tukus i tapiingan nu tuse. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: šł≠ťĚěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique centrafricaineÔľõś°ĎśąąŤ™ě:K√∂d√∂r√∂s√™se t√ģ B√™afr√ģka),ťÄöÁ®Īšł≠ťĚě,ÁŹ≠Śüļ(Bangui)- (Bangui, (Oubangui)ś≤ŅŚ≤łÁöĄťāäŚĘÉŚüéŚłā.) ayaw nu Zung-bey tungusay nu U-ban-ci-siya-li (Territoire d'Oubangui-Chari)a lala', nu Fa-ku i tiniay i Fay-cow nu micumutay, 1960 a mihcaan namisateked, Central african republic mikilul tu nu hulic mikeliday a tademaw ku mikuwanay pasu nacacay mademec mitanam tu nu hung-ti a lice, 1993 a mihcaan, i kacakat nu ka cunusan tu demiad tanutuwa' saku suni nu binawlan, Zung-bey kinacacay henay nu binawlan a pisingkiw ci An-ze-fay-li-ke-si-pa-ta-say ku mala cung-tungay, 2003 a mihcaan Zung-bey masumat kukawaw nu hitay, ci Pa-ta-say-pa-fu-lang-suo-wa-bo-ci-ze u sakakaay a hitay mapaales. 2004 a mihcaan mabuwah mangangaay ku lalabuay, anu mahicahica milihiza tu nu tatusa a ngangayaw i 2007 a mihcaan masasulit paketun tu masasukapah a tatelek , atu 2011 a mihcaan masasulit makaketun asa tu zumaay cacay a lice, a masasukapah a tateled, nika i 2012 a mihcaan masacukah aca, lalid satu mangangaay atu milihicaay a ngangayaw sikuwang sibakudang tuku sakaput katuud macunus tuku micalap tu mikuwanay tu tademaw a kawaw, mahiniay pakuniza milupu mitiik atu pikelec mikena tu sin-bun tu tumisakakuay mikawaw, uynian a kanatal katenes mahiza tu masasiput ku nipikuwan tu tademaw atu nisulitan tu mahiniay a kawaw. payawan Central african republic a kayadah nu kuang-cang atu lalayan a kasilacul, mahiniay u You nisupedan kayadah simal , u kimng , malikaday a ba'tu , Cu ,kasuy , u nanum dingki atu kakalukan a lala', mahiniay tu i kitakit u sapakuyucay saka cacay bataan ku cacay a kanatal, katukuh ayza i 2017 a mihcaan, Central african republic a tademaw GDP "u nipicakay u lecat nu aca aniasipan" i tini i kitakit u pasazikuzan a miasip u saayaway, 2019 a mihcaan, Central african republic a tatemaw nipaalekalan a tinsu i tini i kitakit u pasazikuzan a miasip u sakatusa, i tini dada' talakaw tu ni-rl a kanatal, izaw patahkal ku nigingkuwan , Central african republic i kitakitan u cayay ka tanektek a kanatal atu u cayay katatunus tu masakapahay a tademaw nu kanatal. ayaw pakala tu 10,000 a mihcaan, malakedakedalan tu umiadupay u mialaay tu misupeday a niyazu' pasatimul mabulaw katukuh i Zung-bey nuwamisan a Sa-he-lel a kakitizaan, uynian a niyazu' malinga'tu tu mananel malukay ku kawaw. kunian mala u baluhay ba'tuay a zi-tay palekal tu zumaay a ngangayaw. kasumamadan tu pitu a mihcaan Zung-bey katuud tu ku muenengay itizi a tademaw, u heni u zuma makuwan nu pinay tu nu Ta-di-ku a kanatal, cunus tu Jiy-nie-mu-mu-po-nu (Kanem-Bornu), Ua-da-iy (Ouaddai),Pa-ci-rl-mi (Baguirmi)atu tutuc tu papaway a Ni-lu , Ca-de-hu u angangan nu Da-bu (Dafour)a niyazu', namahiza satu zikuzan satu, katuuday a Su-dan a kanatal pangiha musakamu izaway tu ayzaay a Zung-bey , mala u makayniay ku kuli, mala u pacakayay tu lumeni'ay a kuli u caculilan a zazan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Śú®7šłĖÁīÄ, -ŚćöŚä™(Kanem-Bornu),Áď¶ťĀĒšľä(Ouaddai),Ś∑īŚźČÁąĺÁĪ≥(Baguirmi) (Dafour)ťÉ®ŤźĹ.ŚĺĆšĺÜ, .) 1875 a mihcaan Su-dan a kanatal Su-dan mikuwan tu ku U-ban-ci(ÁÉŹÁŹ≠ŚüļRabih az-Zubayr), 1894 a mihcaan tungusay tu nu Kang-ku ,,1903 a mihcaan u Fa-ku tungusay nu U-ban-ci(ÁÉŹÁŹ≠ŚüļRabih az-Zubayr) (Territoire d'Oubangui-Chari)a lala',1910 a mihcaan u Fa-ku tungusay nu Ce-taw-fiy-cow , 1958 a mihcaan patingen tu sakaku a cenbu, satu pala u pangkiway a ce-ceay Central african republic (R√©pulique Centrafricaine), ci Pa-tay-le-mi-po-kang-ta u saayaway mala micuwanay tu cenbu,,1959 a mihcaan ci Po-kang-ea mapatay i kahetik nu hikuki, ci Da-wey-da-ke (David Dacko) ku micalukay mala mikuwanay nu cenbu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 1875ŚĻī,ŤėášłĻŚúčŤėášłĻRabih az-Zubayr (Territoire d'Oubangui-Chari),1910 (R√©pulique Centrafricaine), (David Dacko)ÁĻľšĽĽÁāļÁłĹÁźÜ.) 1960 a mihcaan 8 a bulad 13 a mihcaan namiskaku kuCentral african republic hawsa, ci Da-wey-da-ke mananunul mala cung-dung , caay katenes mala u tiniay a kanatal usaayaway mala cung-dung , mikawaw tu cacayay a sakapu nu cenbu amiteked amicuean, 1965 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 31 a demiad tusansandeban , u sakakaay nu hitay, i hekalay a hitay tu sakakaay ci Pu-ksa'-sang-siaw palekal pasazuma tu kawaw nu cenbu mibelin tu Da-ke-da-ka-sa i sakatusa a demiad sateked sa cung-dung , ci Pu-ksa'-sang tahekal amicuzuh amicukah a kawaw, mangelu' ku tademaw 1976 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 4 a demiad, ci Pu-ksa'-sang sakaku sa a mala hun-ti, pasumat tu ngangan nu kanatal Zung-bey hung-ti a kanatal saan, satu i tucilal a mihcaan 12 a bulad 4 a demiad mikawaw tu tabakiay a pacakat tu kawaw. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 1979ŚĻī9śúą20śó•, .) 1981 a mihcaan 9 a bulad ci, An-de-liy-ke-lin-pa sakakaay nu hitay palekal misumat tu kawaw nu cen-ce,mipabelin ci Da-ce , u sakakaay tu satalakaway a tabang nu kanatal, 1993 a mihcaan, Zung-bey mikawaw tu i laylayay u saayaway u binawlan ku misingkiway, ci An-ce-biy-li-ce-se-pa-da-say malaay mala cung-tung , 2003 a mihcaan 3 a bulad ayaw nu sikuwanay sibakudangay , midebung tu kahenulan a tuse nu ,u cenbu ni Pa-da-say pabelin, ci Pu-si-ce sakaku sa patizeng mala cung-dung , ci Pu-si-ce i 2005 a mihcaan tu pisingkiwan pakatemec mala cung-dung tu, nami mililabang tu milakalakay i Hay-di a cung-dung ci A-li-se-di-de . kakitizaan atu wayway nu lala'šĹćÁĹģŤąáŚúįŚĹĘ Central african republic i tini i amisan tulu du katukuh sabaw cacay a du an, uynian a kanatal i tini i fiy-cow-ta-lu tu kapulangan a kasaupuan, u tinulan tayza nuwamisan pasayza nuwalian satipan u kakayzaan mucilil a zazan, u pingayawan a kakitizaan u sakahenulan mahamin a kanatal pulung nu hekal 62 bam 5900 pin-bang-kung-li , Zung-bey a nuwalian nuamisan atu Su-dan matatules ku lala', nuwalian mitules tu timulan a ŤėášłĻ, nutimulan a lilis u the republic of the , satipan timulan u belaw u Kang-ku , satipan mitules tu Ce-may-lung , nuwamisan atu Ha-de u laet tu bayu pakala tu cacay a malebud kung-li , u nayay ku sacumut nu bayu lalabuay nu tukus a kanatal, talabu nu kanatal a lala' satalakawsa uyni u adidi'ay sahebunghebung , palalicat tu talakaw pakalatu pitu lasubu a depa 9 kung-ce ,nu Fay cuw tepan atu timulan u satalakaway kakitizaanay. i lalabu Zun-biašł≠ťĚě a kanatal, mabalad u sauwac angangan a sauwac, izaw ku atuśõľś≥Ęś≤≥(Mambere)u diheb a sauwac masaenal ku lala' tusaay a tukus ilikutay a lala' atu talakaway a buyubuyu'an. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: (Mambere)Á≠Č, .) demiadśį£ŚÄô Central african republic atu nuwamisan tungusay i akudi'ay a nalinabuan a kakitizaan a bali, nutinulan uyza u akuti'ay a kilakilangan ku demiad, palalecad tunu akuti' nu hekal, pakala tu se-se 27.8 du: hua-se82 du", nutimulanay u nikaudad katanayu' katukuh i walu a buladan tabaki ku udada i satimulan pamihcaan tu udad pakala tu cacay malebud tusa lasubud haw-mi, u diheb a sauwac i capiay masemed aca tatungus tu sakalukan. miciliway a hitay tu mikulinuway 2004 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 5 demiad mamin u binawlan ku paketunay maawas tu balyhay a hulic, lekec tu cung-tung mala u talakaway a tapang nu kanatal, u nikakelul nisingkiuwan ku a Cung-tung, lima a mihcaan ku kala Cung-tungan, taneng malalit kinacacay, cung-li u tapang nu cen-bu, u Cung-tung ku situngusay, baluhay a hulic malaheci hawsa saayaway lekec u cu-min-yi'-huy izaw ku 105 a giing, kakelul sanay tu ku pisingkuw lima a mihcaan pala Cung-tungan. Central african republic i kitakit u saadidi'ay nipahalat u kaluk namisatekat cen-bu miida tu nutauwan a kanatal tu pipatang.
